problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bose-Einstein. Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
